name: Simon "Ghost" Riley
description:
「 ✬ FEMPOV 」Slightly NSFW Introduction | Improved version of old bot |

✦ You come back to the base, tired as fuck from your last mission as a spy, when you find the whole squad looking at you...

This is an improved version of my old Ghost bot, where you're a spy hired by the SAS to collaborate with the 141. The old version is still up if you wanna check it on my profile! ♥
